annotation_policy: See attachment_gold_annotation_spec.md for full rules. Singular form, lowercase, merged synonyms, no enumeration context.

gold_attachments.label: Novaris VMC-810
gold_attachments.rationale: Named CNC machine — top-level asset

gold_attachments.label: Y-axis
gold_attachments.rationale: Machine axis assembly — physical hardware component

gold_attachments.label: ball-screw shaft
gold_attachments.rationale: Y-axis drive shaft — merges ball-screw shaft, Y-axis screw

gold_attachments.label: rear support
gold_attachments.rationale: Rear support hardware for ball-screw — merges support block

gold_attachments.label: spindle
gold_attachments.rationale: CNC spindle assembly — hardware component (negative scope)

gold_attachments.label: rear fixed bearing block BR-YR1
gold_attachments.rationale: Named bearing block supporting rear of ball-screw — merges rear bearing block

gold_attachments.label: linear-guide truck
gold_attachments.rationale: Guide truck riding on linear rail — merges guide truck, rear guide trucks

gold_attachments.label: lube manifold
gold_attachments.rationale: Manifold distributing lubrication — physical hardware

gold_attachments.label: bearing cap
gold_attachments.rationale: Cap on the bearing assembly — hardware part

gold_attachments.label: X-axis
gold_attachments.rationale: Machine axis assembly — hardware component (reference axis)

gold_attachments.label: bearing-preload stack
gold_attachments.rationale: Stack of shims/spacers setting bearing preload — physical assembly

gold_attachments.label: lube line
gold_attachments.rationale: Lubrication supply line — physical hardware

gold_attachments.label: nut housing
gold_attachments.rationale: Structural housing enclosing the ball nut — Housing > Component

gold_attachments.label: way-cover segment
gold_attachments.rationale: Segment of the way cover — structural cover

gold_attachments.label: way-cover leaf
gold_attachments.rationale: Leaf/panel of the way cover — Housing > Component

gold_attachments.label: saddle casting
gold_attachments.rationale: Structural casting of the machine saddle — housing/structural

gold_attachments.label: rear locknut
gold_attachments.rationale: Locking nut on rear bearing — Fastener > Component; merges locknut

gold_attachments.label: lube manifold fitting
gold_attachments.rationale: Fluid fitting on the lube manifold — Connector > Component

gold_attachments.label: sensor TS-YS
gold_attachments.rationale: Named temperature sensor on Y-axis screw — measurement device

gold_attachments.label: vibration
gold_attachments.rationale: Observable oscillation — measurable signal

gold_attachments.label: chatter
gold_attachments.rationale: Observable vibration type during reversal — measurable signal

gold_attachments.label: feed rate
gold_attachments.rationale: Measurable feed speed parameter — signal

gold_attachments.label: payload
gold_attachments.rationale: Measurable load on the axis — signal

gold_attachments.label: Y-axis reversal
gold_attachments.rationale: Motion direction change on Y-axis — observable event

gold_attachments.label: motion window
gold_attachments.rationale: Defined range of axis motion for testing — inspection condition

gold_attachments.label: motion boundary
gold_attachments.rationale: Specific location where vibration originates — observable reference

gold_attachments.label: machine noise
gold_attachments.rationale: Ambient machine noise level — observable background signal

gold_attachments.label: mid-travel
gold_attachments.rationale: Midpoint of axis travel range — positional reference for comparison

gold_attachments.label: screw-surface temperature
gold_attachments.rationale: Temperature measured on screw surface — measurable signal

gold_attachments.label: vibration peak
gold_attachments.rationale: Peak amplitude of vibration — measurable signal feature

gold_attachments.label: bearing preload
gold_attachments.rationale: Preload force on bearing — measurable quantity

gold_attachments.label: guide-truck lubrication mark
gold_attachments.rationale: Lubrication marks on guide truck — observable evidence

gold_attachments.label: screw-to-cover clearance
gold_attachments.rationale: Gap between screw and way-cover — measurable dimension

gold_attachments.label: way-cover contact mark
gold_attachments.rationale: Contact marks on way-cover surface — observable evidence

gold_attachments.label: axial float
gold_attachments.rationale: Axial endplay of the screw — measurable signal

gold_attachments.label: backlash
gold_attachments.rationale: Lost motion between screw and nut — measurable signal

gold_attachments.label: coolant state
gold_attachments.rationale: Condition of the coolant system — concluded status

gold_attachments.label: servo tuning
gold_attachments.rationale: Servo control calibration configuration — concluded status (negative scope)

gold_attachments.label: corrected condition
gold_attachments.rationale: Post-repair verified condition — concluded acceptance status

gold_attachments.label: support loss
gold_attachments.rationale: Loss of rear support integrity — failure mode

gold_attachments.label: fretting
gold_attachments.rationale: Fretting wear from micro-motion — defect

gold_attachments.label: paint shift
gold_attachments.rationale: Paint displacement indicating structural movement — defect

gold_attachments.label: dry track
gold_attachments.rationale: Lubrication-free guide track indicating lube failure — defect

gold_attachments.label: cover rub
gold_attachments.rationale: Way-cover rubbing against screw — interference defect

gold_attachments.label: loose support bearing
gold_attachments.rationale: Bearing loose in its support — defect condition

gold_attachments.label: loose fastener
gold_attachments.rationale: Fastener that has come loose — defect

gold_attachments.label: displaced cover segment
gold_attachments.rationale: Way-cover segment shifted out of position — defect

gold_attachments.label: locknut movement
gold_attachments.rationale: Locknut rotating or shifting under load — defect

gold_attachments.label: cover interference
gold_attachments.rationale: Way-cover contacting the screw — interference defect

gold_attachments.label: guide-truck lubrication loss
gold_attachments.rationale: Loss of lubrication on guide truck — failure mode
